name: catalog-browser-pages
description: Reference pages for browsing the catalog: home (hero + suggested + new), type listing with category filter, full-text search. Plus Header, Section, EmptyState, CatalogGrid components.
postInstall: 1. These are templates — fork them rather than copying verbatim
2. Customize <Header brand="Your Name" /> and the desktopNav array for your routes
3. The /games page is identical to /apps (just listType('games')) — copy and adapt
4. Replace the search algorithm with FTS5 or Postgres full-text if you have many entries
